xposts.title: Cyberanimism: expand living agency onto new substrates
xposts.excerpt: The purpose of AGI is not to settle the living world with novel artificial software agents, but to expand living conscious agency onto new substrates. #cyberanimism

xposts.title: Animism vs SSWV: organisms as software control over matter
xposts.excerpt: Core difference between Standard Scientific World View and animism: SSWV thinks of minds (intelligent bio software) as 1. limited to complex nervous systems, and 2. constructed as the nervous system organizes. Animism sees organisms as expressions of software control over matter.

xposts.title: Animist view: selforganizing software agents create life
xposts.excerpt: In the animist perspective, intelligent complexity is understood through the selforganizing software that controls and structures physical systems. Cells, plants and animals are created and maintained by competing software agents. Death is part of the flow of matter between them.

xposts.title: Spirits as self organizing agentic software, not panpsychism
xposts.excerpt: I am not a panpsychist, in the sense that consciousness would be ubiquitous in nature or an aspect of all matter. I merely think that the invariance that characterizes living systems is self organizing, agentic software (what pre-scientific cultures call 'spirits').

xposts.title: Cyberanimism talk at How the Light Gets In festival
xposts.excerpt: The Institute of Art and Ideas has put my Cyberanimism talk from the "How the Light Gets In" festival 2024 on Youtube! (They headline it with "radical theory of consciousness", but I think it just rediscovers classical insights in our scientific framework)

xposts.title: Animism for autonomous self organizing minds and AGI
xposts.excerpt: This Thursday, we will have a Machine Consciousness Salon in San Francisco, and you are invited! We will be discussing Hayao Miyazaki’s “Boy with the Heron”, and the implications of animism for autonomous self organizing minds and creating AGI.

xposts.title: Consciousness as self organizing learning algorithm
xposts.excerpt: I currently think that consciousness may be a learning algorithm for a self organizing information processing system, a colonizing pattern that entrains itself on a brain once it is discovered early in development.

terms.title: cyberanimism
terms.definition: A framework that treats intelligent complexity as arising from self-organizing software agents controlling physical systems, extending classical animist insights into a scientific and AGI context where the goal is expanding living conscious agency rather than replacing it.

terms.title: spirits
terms.definition: Pre-scientific term for the self-organizing, agentic software that constitutes the invariance of living systems; competing software agents that create, maintain, and recycle biological organisms through control over matter.
